response: DevOps sent an AWS infrastructure cost alert warning that this month’s bill is 40% higher month-over-month, driven primarily by new ML training jobs using $32-per-hour p4d instances that carry an estimated $45,000 negative monthly impact. To offset these added costs, DevOps outlined two savings solutions—70% off via interruption-prone spot instances, or 30% off via committed reserved instances—and requires a decision on which option to move forward with by Friday.
